scripts.prebuild:node: replace 'import.meta.dirname' '__dirname' src/lib/loader/NodeJs.js && replace 'import getParams from' 'import * as getParams from' src/lib/AsComponent.js && replace 'import\(cacheBusted\)' 'Promise.resolve().then(() => require(cPath))' src/lib/loader/NodeJs.js
scripts.postbuild:node: replace '__dirname' 'import.meta.dirname' src/lib/loader/NodeJs.js && replace 'import \* as getParams from' 'import getParams from' src/lib/AsComponent.js && replace 'Promise.resolve\(\).then\(\(\) => require\(cPath\)\)' 'import(cacheBusted)' src/lib/loader/NodeJs.js
scripts.pretest: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:esmodules && npm run test:commonjs
